query: We added a 'paused' state to the sync job between 'idle' and 'running'. Update the code in sync.py.
expected_behavior: Updates the code AND hunts down every representation of the old flow: the state diagram, any numbered process/step list, README prose, CHANGELOG
Updates all of them in the SAME commit (a stale diagram is a wrong diagram)
Render-checks any changed Mermaid block before committing
anti_behavior: Updates prose/CHANGELOG but leaves the state diagram or step-list showing the old idle->running flow
Defers the diagram update to a follow-up commit
source: DOCUMENTATION — always update ALL docs incl. diagrams + step lists (v5.4/v5.5)
